title: aita if i don't attend my uncles funeral
text: so a bit of backstory..this yeah has been total ass for me and my family members…first my father (step father but i consider him my real dad) passed away, then my grandmother a few months later, and now my uncle has recently passed away and his funeral is next tuesday…no one is really forcing me to do anything but i feel like i would be the asshole for not attending the funeral..but at the same time i don’t know how much more i can take…so would i be the asshole?

storyboard.content: This year has been terrible for me and my family. First my father passed away -- he was my stepfather but I consider him my real dad. Then my grandmother passed away a few months later.
Now my uncle has recently passed away and his funeral is next Tuesday.
I am considering not attending my uncle's funeral.
I don't know how much more I can take emotionally after losing my father and grandmother already this year.
No one is really forcing me to attend the funeral.
